creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Artem,

there seems to be a problem on amd64:

===>  Building package for kdesvn-1.0.4
tar: lib/kde3/kded_kdesvnd.la: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/kde3/kded_kdesvnd.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/kde3/kio_ksvn.la: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/kde3/kio_ksvn.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/kde3/libkdesvnpart.la: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/kde3/libkdesvnpart.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/libsvnqt.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/libsvnqt.so.4: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/libsvnqt.so.4.2.2: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

Regards,
Stefan
